meaning: n.由直升机送上山顶的高山滑雪
examples: Surfing down the ash covering a volcano in Nicaragua, heliskiing in Chile, anaconda hunting in the Amazon and motorbike safaris in Namibia are all popular.
Perhaps it was the heliskiing in the Himalayas or the cycling in Ireland that helped Wal King, whom we glowingly profiled in 2007, keep Leighton Holdings on track.
